summary: Frontend testing of TRUCKERS NAV BY TUE app iteration 81. Verified vehicle restriction icons feature: tile URL now includes 'features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive&ppi=400' parameter. Yellow diamond weight limit signs (6T) and truck prohibition icons are visible on HERE Maps satellite tiles at zoom 10+. All 8 requested features tested and working.

minor.issue: API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Tile URL includes features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive parameter (hereMapUtils.ts line 35)
VERIFIED: Tile URL includes ppi=400 for high resolution tiles (hereMapUtils.ts line 35)
VERIFIED: Yellow diamond weight limit signs (6T) visible on map tiles at zoom 13
VERIFIED: Map renders logistics.satellite.day tiles with 55-degree tilt perspective (hereMapUtils.ts line 50)
VERIFIED: Guest login works (Continue as Guest button)
VERIFIED: Navigation view shows satellite map with restriction icons
VERIFIED: Map controls work (zoom in/out, HERE/SAT toggle, follow button)
VERIFIED: Route calculation works (searched Dallas TX, clicked ROUTE, 3 alternatives shown)
VERIFIED: Route comparison panel shows PRIMARY (9h 33m, 661.0 mi, $357.97), ALT 1 (10h 24m, 674.3 mi), ALT 2 (10h 31m, 694.3 mi)
VERIFIED: Turn-by-turn navigation header shows maneuver instruction
VERIFIED: TRUCK RESTRICTIONS panel shows toll booth warning
VERIFIED: Highway shields (I-29, Exit 10) visible on route
VERIFIED: Speed limit sign (35 mph) visible

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Vehicle restriction icons feature successfully implemented. Tile URL in hereMapUtils.ts line 35 now includes 'features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive&ppi=400'. Yellow diamond weight limit signs (6T) and truck prohibition circles are rendered natively by HERE Maps in the tile images at zoom 10+. Most visible at zoom 13-16+. The icons are part of the raster tile image, not separate DOM elements. Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

vehicle_restriction_icons_visible.details: Yellow diamond weight limit signs (6T) clearly visible on map tiles at zoom 13. These are rendered natively by HERE Maps via the features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive parameter.

tile_url_parameter.details: Verified in code: hereMapUtils.ts line 35 includes 'features=vehicle_restrictions:active_and_inactive&ppi=400'

logistics_satellite_day_tiles.details: Map renders logistics.satellite.day style tiles with satellite imagery and logistics overlays

55_degree_tilt.details: Map tilt set to 55 degrees in hereMapUtils.ts line 50

guest_login.details: Continue as Guest button works, navigates to COMMAND CENTER dashboard

navigation_view.details: Navigation view renders with HERE Maps satellite tiles and vehicle restriction icons

map_controls.details: Zoom in/out, HERE/SAT toggle, follow button all working

route_calculation.details: Route calculated from Council Bluffs, Iowa to Dallas, TX - 3 alternatives shown with fuel cost estimates

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.
known_issues.geolocation: Geolocation fails in headless browser - defaults to Council Bluffs, Iowa via IP geolocation fallback. Expected behavior.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, Mapbox, etc.)
